case_title: VIEN VAN KHA et al VS. PAUL J. LUBITZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY KHA, VIEN VAN LIEN, HIEN LUBITZ, PAUL J.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-23-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KHA, VIEN VAN LIEN, HIEN AS TO DEFENDANT LUBITZ, PAUL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $25.00 - SERVED JUN-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUBITZ, PAUL J.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY VICTOR NGO--VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHA, VIEN VAN LIEN, HIEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUBITZ, PAUL J. PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT THE ACCIDENT JUSTIFIFED THEIR CHIROPRATIC BILLS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
